When we run,
we move the city.

LACE is a running network born in the streets of Naples. 3,000+ runners across four cities. Weekly sessions are free and open. Core membership is limited.

The movement

Born in the streets of Naples

This isn't just about running. It's about claiming space. We move as one through alleys, piazzas and coastal roads, carrying the soul of the city with us.

Fast or slow, day or night. Anyone can show up on a Wednesday and run for free. That door stays open. What we protect is the inside: the crew, the experiences, the standard.

LACE is not a trend. It's a movement.

Membership — now accepting: Napoli only

Free to run.
Limited to belong.

Join Core — €20/month
First wave: 25 of 100 Napoli places. Next wave opens when this one fills.
Founding
€70 / year
  • Everything in Core
  • Founding member number, permanent
  • Guaranteed spot at every experience
  • A voice in where LACE goes next
Request invite
First 50 members only. Rate locked for life.

We don't gate the run. We gate the inside. Anyone can train with us for free every week. Core exists for the people who want to build this with us, and it stays small on purpose. Caserta, Milano and Salerno intakes open after Napoli fills.

Experiences — priority to Core

Beyond the weekly

Capped
July 2026 · Ischia
The Island Experience

A full day on Ischia. Coastal run, sea swim, long table at Kiwi Bar. One boat, one crew, capped numbers.

Request a spot →
July 18 · Naturale, Castel Volturno
Fitness Village

A day-long takeover at Naturale Beach Club. Sprint heats on sand, hybrid stations, music until the light goes.

Get notified →

Limited run. Gone is gone.

Pre-order
Naples Division Crop Top

Heavyweight cotton crop. Naples Division crest with the corno on the chest, "Built where nothing was promised" over Vesuvius on the back. Pre-order now, produced in limited numbers.

The team

The people who set the pace

"We didn't start LACE to be a run club. We started it so that anyone in this city could find their people at 20:00 on a Wednesday — and never let go of them."
— Jamal Allen · Founder — LACE Napoli, LACE Milano & the LACE Network
Jamal Allen
Founder — LACE Network

HYROX Pro competitor and endurance athlete. Marathoner, race pacer, and lead coach for LACE track workouts. He leads a community of 3,000+ members, one of the fastest growing running movements in Southern Italy.

Instagram →
Simone Palumbo
Pacer

Naples native and hybrid athlete. He came from natural bodybuilding, ran his first half marathon in 1:27, and now paces LACE events and workouts, helping runners find their rhythm on the road.

Instagram →
Aquileo Reyes Jr.
Trail Coach · Pacer

Ultra distance runner and road cyclist. His races include Ronda Ghibellina Plus (UTMB Index), Arezzo Wild Trail Marathon 42K and Puglia by UTMB 50K. He leads the LACE trail and ultra crew.

Instagram →
Victoriya Mauriello
Head of Lace Women · Pacer

Former Serie B2 volleyball professional and competitive swimmer. She now combines powerlifting, running and HYROX prep, and leads more women into running, strength and hybrid sport.

Instagram →
Runs and events built with

The run is free.
The inside is earned.

Core Napoli is open above. Leave your email for Founding invites and for when Caserta, Milano and Salerno open. Until then: Wednesday, 20:00. Just show up.
